name: weather-forecast-agent
description: An AI agent that provides weather forecasts, alerts, and location-based weather recommendations
capabilities: Get current weather for any location

tools.name: get_weather
tools.description: Get current weather conditions for a location

tools.name: store_location
tools.description: Save a favorite location for quick access

skills.name: weather-lookup
skills.description: Fetching weather data using Google Search and weather APIs

skills.name: activity-recommendation
skills.description: Recommending outdoor activities based on weather conditions

skills.name: location-management
skills.description: Managing saved locations for quick weather checks

subagents.name: weather_search
subagents.purpose: Search for weather data using Google Search when direct API fails

subagents.name: alert_checker
subagents.purpose: Check for severe weather alerts in a region

memory_schemas.name: weather_cache_schema
memory_schemas.description: Cached weather data to avoid redundant API calls

ui_views.name: index
ui_views.description: Dashboard showing weather for favorite locations

ui_views.name: chat
ui_views.description: Chat interface for natural language queries

environment_variables.name: GEMINI_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Gemini API key for AI features

environment_variables.name: OPENWEATHER_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: OpenWeatherMap API key (optional, uses Google Search otherwise)
